statusPolicy.collectedRequires: verified retained inventory evidence or an ON persistent ItemLot/Shop acquisition flag
statusPolicy.missingRequires: verified absence plus all mapped persistent acquisition flags OFF
statusPolicy.unknownRequires: inventory and mapped persistent acquisition evidence cannot be decoded
statusPolicy.details: Retained key items use inventory evidence. Consumed, transformed, or superseded items use their dedicated ItemLotParam or ShopLineupParam acquisition flags, with current inventory retained as corroboration. Acquisition guidance never drives status.

unresolved.details: EquipParamGoods exposes two Holy Chapter: Infested rows that share acquisition flag 50006320. They remain separate mapped rows for provenance, although they represent the same logical quest text in the UI.
